title: WinTune Tweak Metadata
description: Schema for the embedded comment block at the top of each tweak .ps1 file. Parsed by TweaksEngine via regex.

TWEAK.description: Tweak ID (kebab-case). Must match the filename (without .ps1).

CATEGORY.description: Tweak category. Must match a subdirectory under src/tweaks/.

DESCRIPTION.description: One-line description of what this tweak does.

BUILD_MIN.description: Minimum Windows build number where this tweak applies (e.g. 22000 for Win11 21H2). 0 = no minimum.

BUILD_MAX.description: Maximum Windows build number where this tweak applies. 0 = no upper limit.

DANGEROUS.description: If true, this tweak affects security settings (Defender, UAC, etc.) and requires the -Dangerous CLI flag.
